wordplay_note: A garden devastated — paradise lost through alien games
card_description: Pete Garden (meaning "Garden = garden/paradise") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Game-Players of Titan*. Member of Pretty Blue Fox game-playing group on a depopulated Earth. Name note: A garden devastated — paradise lost through alien games. Games as the last human activity when reproduction has nearly ceased. First appears in *The Game-Players of Titan*.

reference.brief: Member of Pretty Blue Fox game-playing group on a depopulated Earth
reference.significance: Games as the last human activity when reproduction has nearly ceased
